message:
chore(audit): record batch 430 (boundary values, remaining files)

Boundary value audit across 8 modules: raptorq pipeline, consistent hash,
load balance, rate limit, stream/chunks, conformal, happy eyeballs,
messaging consumer — all handle zero/one/max/empty correctly.

Additional files: replay.rs, browser_storage.rs, trace/divergence.rs,
instrumented_future.rs, lab/explorer.rs — all SOUND.

Grand total: 39 bugs fixed, 255+ files audited, ~315K+ lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
